notes: This file is the canonical app-owned structure draft.
The workbook and workbook-schema-companion remain useful for validation, migration, and intake.
Addresses should remain stable whenever possible.
Every normal L1 should begin from one shared base structure before adding entity-specific extension layers.
Shared base fields should keep shared canonical names such as Name and Summary instead of drifting into entity-prefixed duplicates.

base_l1_contract.description: The shared starter contract for normal L1 files.

shared_system_base.rule: Shared system fields should keep shared canonical names across L1 files.

shared_kdb_base.rule: KDB is the shared linkage section for declared relationships. It is a required base subsection, but it is not one fixed universal leaf set.

shared_general_base.rule: Name and Summary are shared canonical fields and should not be renamed per entity when the meaning is shared.

entity_extension_layers.rule: After the shared base, each L1 may add independent L2 sections and explicit L2.a-b-c-d subgrouping when canon declares it.

controlled_exception.rule: BB File is a system-level file and may use its own approved subsection contract.
